name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you want.

## Expected User Flow

Explain how users would use it step by step.

## Scope

- UI / UX
- Document parsing
- OCR
- Model integration
- Packaging
- Deployment
- Documentation

## Additional Notes

Add mockups, references, or implementation ideas if helpful.
